languages.text: "Прежде чем я выберу, расскажи про достоинства всех троих".
"Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."
languages.original_text: "Прежде чем я выберу, расскажи про достоинства всех троих".

traits.locale_text: "Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."
"Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."
"Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."

languages.text: 「私が選択する前に、３つの利点について教えてくれ」
languages.original_text: "Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."

traits.locale_text: 「私が選択する前に、３つの利点について教えてください。」

languages.text: “在我选择之前，告诉我这三人有什么可取之处。”
languages.original_text: "Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."

traits.locale_text: “在我选择之前，告诉我这三人有什么可取之处。”

languages.text: «Antes de tomar una decisión, cuénteme las ventajas de cada uno de ellos».
languages.original_text: "Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."

traits.locale_text: «Antes de tomar una decisión, cuénteme las ventajas de cada uno de ellos».

languages.text: "Erzählt mir von den Verdiensten der drei, ehe ich meine Entscheidung treffe."
languages.original_text: "Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."

traits.locale_text: "Erzählt mir von den Verdiensten der drei, ehe ich meine Entscheidung treffe."

languages.text: « Avant que je fasse mon choix, décrivez-moi les mérites de chacun de ces hommes. »
languages.original_text: "Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."

traits.locale_text: « Avant que je fasse mon choix, décrivez-moi les mérites de chacun de ces hommes. »

languages.text: "Seçimimi yapmadan önce bana üçünün de meziyetlerini anlatın."
languages.original_text: "Before I make my choice, tell me about the merits of all three."

traits.locale_text: "Seçimimi yapmadan önce bana üçünün de meziyetlerini anlatın."
